task:tangential_quadrilateral_side_lengt.object_description: It includes a convex quadrilateral whose four sides are tangent to an incircle, labeled vertices, tangency points, three visible side-length labels, and one side marked ?.
task:tangential_quadrilateral_side_lengt.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a JSON object with exactly these keys: "A", "B", "C", and "D"; each value must be the pixel point [x,y] at that labeled vertex
task:tangential_quadrilateral_side_lengt.answer_hint: set "answer" to the missing side length as an integer

task:tangent_angle_value_query.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a JSON object with exactly these visible point-label keys: "A", "B", "C", "D", "O", and "T"; each value must be that labeled construction point's pixel point [x,y]
task:tangent_angle_value_query.answer_hint: set "answer" to the target angle in degrees as an integer
